name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability, workflow, or documentation improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user problem should this solve?

## Proposed direction

What would you like to change?

## Scope

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CLI / distribution
- [ ] Workflow / skill
- [ ] Community process
- [ ] Other

## Acceptance signal

How would we know this is successful?

## Boundary

What should this not change?
